reviews.review_description: Challenging but fun. Am stuck on the last level. How do you stop the walls from crushing you.

reviews.review_title: Cant load the game. Error message
reviews.review_description:
I paid and installed the game succesfully but it leaves black screen for a few secs then shows unexpected error occured. 
Never happened to any app.
Pls fix the bug or refund.
Im using S7edge Thank you

developer_response.body:
UPDATE: An update to fix this issue has been released, you should no longer have trouble. Thank you for your patience.

Hi Jiwong0524, We’re very sorry to hear of the difficulties you’ve encountered in Esper, which the team at Coatsink is currently investigating and hope to fix soon. Apologies again, and thanks for taking the time to feedback to the team. Regards, Coatsink

reviews.review_description: Love this game but can't beat the final part

The game has a great sense of humor.  After a while you can feel like you want out of that room, but that's just because the the controls feel intuitive and powerful.  The puzzles always seem to keep coming (haven't reached the end yet).

Looks good, has great mechanics and a good narrator. I enjoyed it a lot but was disappointed when it ended. It left me hoping for more. Luckily Esper 2 is already put and at some point I will buy that. Fingers crossed it's more of the same and longer as well. The puzzles were good but not exceptionally challenging.
A dream come true in vr!
Nice fiction and crazy professor game. You have to think 3D to finish the puzzles.
Still has not been fixed. Do not waste your money.

developer_response.body:
UPDATE: An update to fix this issue has been released, you should no longer have trouble. Thank you for your patience.

Hi JuneJoke, thanks for getting in touch. We have identified issues with Esper and the issues starting the game on certain phones. We are working on a patch to resolve it. If this does not cover your issue please email info@coatsink.com with more details so we can offer support.

reviews.review_description: Basically the vr equivalent of portal :)
App crashes on startup waste of money. Great game when works.

reviews.review_title: A puzzle game with telekinetic powers?
reviews.review_description: I've had this game for a good while and enjoyed it. I love puzzle games very much to help me work my mind. So now, a puzzle game that you have telekinetic powers? I was all in. Although I was stuck on 1 puzzle to the point of quiting the game for months until I recently read up on what to do (Stage 5:3), the puzzles aren't really that bad. Some will definitely put your mind to the test, but not all that bad. Overall I enjoyed the puzzles and the voice acting. Got Esper 2 with Dark Days with the special of $9.99 for both. So now I finally get to see what part 2 is all about.

This is my 2nd favorite VR game only outdone by it's own sequel Esper2! When I first got my Gear VR (free when I purchased the Samsung Galaxy S7 Edge) it came with a bundle of 6 games/experiences free to get ya started. Esper2 was one of those titles! I immediately knew that I had found what was going to be one of my favorite games! As soon as I finished Esper2 for the first time (I have since played it through to the end several times over) I immediately began searching for (the first) Esper. I loved it just as much as 2! The only reason that Esper2 gets a slight bit more love is because it was my first �! Now, more than 2 years (and maaany vr apps, games and experiences) later these two titles remain my favorite! I just love the superb voice acting, the atmosphere, the way you actually feel like you are really a research subject! It just all comes together to deliver a very polished, fun, and all around enjoyable experience! Thank you Devs! And, please, make more like Esper!

developer_response.body: Hey Playgyrl, thank you so much for your kind words. Esper was our first ever VR title and we are still very proud of it. We are happy to hear you enjoy the series we created. Thank you for playing!

reviews.review_title: Good intro to the sequal but...
reviews.review_description: It only seems to be touchpad. Tried a steelseries and the wand controller. Its a bit finicky with touchpad. Have to often tap many times to trigger the switches which was v annoying. Otherwise enjoyable portal-esque game. Good intro for the superior Esper 2!
A great game, very similar to floor plan and please don't touch anything.

Ok, so although the puzzles were fun, and the commentary was entertaining and funny, I finished the game in 1 day! I don't know if I'm a genius or the puzzles were too easy or what, but honestly, for the price, I expected a much longer game. I was definitely planning on buying Esper 2, but after finishing this one, there is no way on earth I would spend $11.99 on a game that I'll probably finish in a few hours.
I greatly enjoyee this game. The puzzles were difficult enough to make me think but not so difficult to feel impossible. The premise and the narrator are both very well done.

reviews.review_title: Does not work on Galaxy Note 8
reviews.review_description: The game does not start on my Samsung Galaxy Note 8. It just crashes back to the Samsung VR launcher. Please fix this!!!

reviews.review_description: Brilliant. Genuinely packed puzzle entertainment.
Thanks guys for fixing it, works pretty well. You mixed up the controller a bit. Up is left down is right.

reviews.review_title: I dont get all the portal comparisons
reviews.review_description: In portal you move around and solve puzzles using portals. This game is not that at all. You are stationary and just move balls around with "your mind." Its an okay puzzle game that doesnt benefit that much from being in vr. I would rather play this in 2d.
